DAILY_BLOCK_SHUFFLE.method: Permute complete normalized intraday price paths across recipient sessions while leaving recipient flow features, product clocks and explicit contracts fixed.

VOLATILITY_MATCHED_RANDOM_WALK.method: Generate zero-drift session price paths with each recipient session's realized one-minute volatility; retain observed flow, volume and timestamps before full signal recomputation.

YEAR_BLOCK_PERMUTATION.method: Swap normalized ordinal-matched August price paths between 2023 and 2024 while retaining recipient flow and timestamps.

verdict.formula: NULL_RATIO = pooled null pass rate / real pass rate

CONTRE: A pass-rate tripwire can detect account geometry but cannot prove economic edge; all candidate promotion remains expectancy-and-DSR based.
